description: Standard M-Pesa result codes per API type

stk_push.0: The service request is processed successfully.
stk_push.2028: The request is not permitted according to product assignment.

b2c.0: The service request is processed successfully.
b2c.1: The balance is insufficient for the transaction.
b2c.2: Declined due to limit rule (below minimum).
b2c.3: Declined due to limit rule (above maximum).
b2c.4: Declined due to limit rule (daily limit).
b2c.8: Declined due to limit rule (balance limit).
b2c.11: The DebitParty is in an invalid state.
b2c.21: The initiator is not allowed to initiate this request.
b2c.2028: The request is not permitted according to product assignment.
b2c.2040: Credit Party customer type can't be supported.

reversal.0: The service request is processed successfully.
reversal.R000001: The transaction has already been reversed.
reversal.11: The DebitParty is in an invalid state.
reversal.21: The initiator is not allowed to initiate this request.
reversal.2028: Not permitted according to product assignment.
